name: Lime Dill Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except olive oil in a blender.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. With the motor running, add olive oil in a steady stream while continuing to blend until thoroughly combined.
4. Add salt and pepper to taste.
Yield: 1/2 cup
From 1994 Shepherd's Garden Seeds Catalog, pg. 23.
Posted by Cathy Harned.
